content: The iterative, unsupervised self-feedback loop of Self-Refine (originally designed for output refinement) can be repurposed as a backbone to unify fragmented LLM self-reflection mechanisms by grounding multi-perspective reflection in sequential improvement. This creates a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine's advantage of no extra training or supervision while adding the robustness of diverse inconsistent solving perspectives from modern self-reflection research.
